About Us

Welcome to Green Guardian your number one source for all Plants [ie: Indoor Plants, Office Plants, Outdoor Plant etc]. We are dedicated to giving you the very best of plants with a focus on customer service. We hope you enjoy our plants as much as we enjoy offering them to you. If you have any questions or comments, please don't hesitate to contact us.
